LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT 35--45 HOLLIS STREET ASSOCIATES, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 1ST, 3RD, AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD THAT DEFENDANTS ACTED WITH THE INTENT TO INTERFERE WITH PLAINTIFF'S CONTRACT WITH THE BUYERS BY TAKING THE MONEY OUT OF THE ESCROW ACCOUNT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.(302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 35--45 HOLLIS STREET ASSOCIATES, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Michael C. Hall, Esq. M C Hall & Associates (415) 512-9865, appearing for Defendant and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer overruled as to 1st, 3rd, and 4th causes of action. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action for intentional interference. Plaintiff must plead that defendants acted with the intent to interfere with plaintiff's contract with the buyers by taking the money out of the escrow account. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
